user_story: As a System admin, I want to enable or disable Active Directory integration, so that employee authentication can be tied to our corporate directory
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Manage Active Directory screen; When I set "Enable active directory integration?" to Yes and save; Then the AD integration setting is applied

user_story: As a System admin, I want to select applicable employee classes for AD integration, so that only the intended employee classes are governed by the directory policy
acceptance_criteria: Given the Manage Active Directory screen; When I choose employee classes such as Permanent or Contract; Then the selected classes are saved as applicable

user_story: As a System admin, I want to scope AD integration by applicable locations, so that the policy targets the correct offices
acceptance_criteria: Given the Manage Active Directory screen; When I select one or more applicable locations; Then those locations are stored for the policy

user_story: As a System admin, I want to scope AD integration by applicable departments, so that the policy applies only to relevant departments
acceptance_criteria: Given the Manage Active Directory screen; When I select applicable departments; Then those departments are saved for the policy

user_story: As a System admin, I want to move positions between available and selected lists using the shuttle controls, so that I can define mandatory and applicable AD positions precisely
acceptance_criteria: Given the Manage Active Directory screen; When I use the >, >>, <, and << buttons to move positions; Then the selected positions list updates accordingly

user_story: As a System admin, I want to designate mandatory Active Directory positions, so that those roles are enforced to have AD accounts
acceptance_criteria: Given the Manage Active Directory screen; When I mark positions as mandatory Active Directory positions; Then they are recorded as mandatory

user_story: As a System admin, I want to save my AD configuration and optionally continue to the next step, so that my settings persist and I can proceed efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured the AD settings; When I click Save or Save & Next; Then the configuration is saved and I remain or advance as chosen
